reason: tests need rewrite, not instruction. The Dockerfile uses base commit a14a89c which lacks scripts/build/ directory needed by tests. The gold patch (bun#26645) patches cmake files, not the TypeScript files (build-jsc.ts, webkit.ts, source.ts, clean.ts) that the tests check. Tests assert on files/strings that don't exist in the environment: scripts/build/clean.ts, scripts/build/deps/webkit.ts, scripts/build/source.ts, scripts/build/CLAUDE.md are all missing. Even with correct instruction.md, nop and gold both return reward=0 due to structural test/environment mismatch.
